/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/drone_simulator.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_simulator.dir/src/SocketClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_simulator.dir/src/SocketServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_simulator.dir/src/DroneState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_simulator.dir/drone.pb.cc.o -o drone_simulator  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so
